title: Login Issue
description:
User unable to login with valid credentials.
Error message shows invalid session.
Occurs on both mobile and web.

title: Payment Failed
description:
Transaction failed during checkout.
Payment gateway not responding.
User charged but order not confirmed.

title: UI Bug on Dashboard
description:
Alignment issue in dashboard widgets.
Buttons overlap on smaller screens.
Affects usability of admin panel.

title: Slow Loading
description:
App takes too long to load.
Initial API response is delayed.
Happens during peak hours.

title: Email Not Sending
description:
System not sending verification emails.
SMTP server may be misconfigured.
Users unable to verify accounts.

title: Password Reset Issue
description:
Reset link not working.
Token expires too quickly.
Users unable to reset passwords.

title: Profile Update Error
description:
Error while updating profile info.
Form submission fails silently.
Data not saved to database.

title: App Crash
description:
Application crashes on startup.
Occurs after latest update.
Affects Android devices mostly.

title: Notification Delay
description:
Push notifications are delayed.
Messages arrive minutes late.
Issue seen in iOS devices.

title: Search Not Working
description:
Search results not showing.
API returns empty array.
Keywords not matching correctly.

title: File Upload Failed
description:
Unable to upload files.
Server returns 413 error.
File size limit may be exceeded.

title: Logout Issue
description:
User stays logged in after logout.
Session not destroyed properly.
Security risk for shared devices.

title: Data Sync Problem
description:
Data not syncing across devices.
Changes not reflected instantly.
Sync service may be down.

title: Broken Link
description:
Some links lead to 404 page.
Incorrect routing configuration.
Affects navigation experience.
